package main

import (
	"fmt"
)

func main() {
	var a, b int
	_, err := fmt.Scan(&a, &b)
	if err != nil {
		return
	}

	soma := a + b
	subtracao := a - b
	multiplicacao := a * b
	divisao := float64(a) / float64(b)
	resto := a % b

	fmt.Println(soma)
	fmt.Println(subtracao)
	fmt.Println(multiplicacao)
	fmt.Printf("%.2f\n", divisao)
	fmt.Println(resto)
}
